item.title: Abbott recommends sweeping data center regulation, including eliminating sales tax exemption
item.description: The recommendations for legislative action amount to a striking call for industry regulation by the Republican governor in a state that has long prided itself on being a favorable environment for business.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Texas high schoolers show gains across all subjects on STAAR tests
item.dc:creator: Sneha Dey

item.title: Texas’ charter school boom may soon bust, experts caution
item.dc:creator: Jaden Edison

item.title: An unprecedented data center boom means new challenges for Texas. Find out what’s planned near you.
item.dc:creator: Emily Foxhall

item.title: Eight data centers threaten to transform this small Texas county. Local officials say they have no power to stop them.
item.dc:creator: Alejandra Martinez

item.title: East Texas county judge urges state lawmakers to help locals combat data center proliferation
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Proposed ban on Big Bend border wall fails in U.S. House funding panel
item.description: Democratic Rep. Henry Cuellar sought to bar the Trump administration from using federal funds to build border barriers in the national park, which is rarely traversed by migrants.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Judge recommends medical parole for inmate who had been on Texas death row for 47 years
item.description: Clarence Curtis Jordan, who is intellectually disabled and had no legal representation for decades, was resentenced to life in prison with the possibility of parole.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Texas death row inmate asks Supreme Court to allow appeal challenging hypnotized witness
item.description: Charles Flores wants to use Texas’ “junk science” law to appeal his conviction, saying it was improperly based on testimony from a neighbor who was hypnotized by police.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Elected Officials Directory
item.description: To help Texans know more about their representatives, we’ve gathered the bios, contact information and more for the occupants of the state’s highest offices.

item.title: Government Salaries Explorer
item.description: Review the compensation of hundreds of thousands of state and municipal employees in Texas.

item.title: Texas Public Schools Explorer
item.description: Review enrollment trends, demographics, teacher experience, pay and outcomes for all schools, and more.

item.title: Indian group targeted by Trump scored policy wins after backing Texas firm tied to president’s son
item.dc:creator: ProPublica

item.title: Government watchdog says Texas detention center wasted up to $11.5 million before detainees arrived
item.dc:creator: by

item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Screwworm outbreak hits vacant Texas congressional district, as leading candidates scramble to assist

item.title: The Tribune introduces 11 summer fellows

item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Join Texas public school educators on July 1 to consider “What makes a great school?”

item.title: Three new cases of screwworm confirmed in Texas; A&M leader tasked as federal adviser

item.title: Where are the data centers in Texas? Help us continue our reporting.

item.title: Local Texas election officials await appointment of new secretary of state as midterm preparations ramp up
